zh.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray於1044年出生在法國奧維阿利也奧比尼。她於1061年與Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯奧比尼結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1100年在法國諾門迪曼其沙吉索維-拉-包莫拉也享年56歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray于1044年出生在法国奧維阿利也奧比尼。她于1061年与Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯奧比尼结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1100年在法国諾門迪曼其沙吉索維-拉-包莫拉也享年56岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray was born in 1044, in Aubigny, Allier, Auvergne, France. She married Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny in 1061, in Aubigny, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1100, in Saint-Sauveur-la-Pommeraye, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray est née en 1044, à Aubigny, Allier, Auvergne, France. Elle a épousé Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny en 1061, à Aubigny, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1100, à Saint-Sauveur-la-Pommeraye, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray wurde 1044 in Aubigny, Allier, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren. Sie hat 1061 in Aubigny, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1100 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Saint-Sauveur-la-Pommeraye, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray è nata il nel 1044 nel Aubigny, Allier, Auvergne, Francia. Lei sposato Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny nel 1061, nel Aubigny, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1100, nel Saint-Sauveur-la-Pommeraye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbrayは1044年にフランスアウバーグンアリールアウビグニーで生まれた。1061年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスアウビグニーでRoger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1100年にフランスノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウル-ラ-プオンメレイで56歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray(은)는 1044년 프랑스 오버그니 앨리어 오비그니에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1061년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 오비그니에서 Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1100년 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우-라-폼머아예에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우르에 묻혔다.

mn.Thirsk Castle, Thirsk, Yorkshire, Englan: Thirsk, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray nasceu em 1044, em Aubigny, Allier, Auvergne, França. Ela casou-se com Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny em 1061, em Aubigny, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1100, em Saint-Sauveur-la-Pommeraye, Manche, Normandie, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray родилась в 1044 г. в местности аубигни, аллиир, аувиргн, Франция. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny в 1061 г. в местности аубигни, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1100 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур-ла-поммиреи, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности сеинт-саувеур, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Adeliza De Mowbray nació en 1044, en Aubigny, Allier, Auvergne, Francia. Se casó con Roger "Pincerna" D'Aubigny De St. Martin-Aubigny en 1061, en Aubigny, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1100, en Saint-Sauveur-la-Pommeraye, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
